response.justification: The candidate lacks direct experience with SoC/IP modeling, AI accelerator architectures, and hardware-software co-design, which are core to the Principal Performance Architect role. While Bogdan has strong software engineering credentials (e.g., full-stack, AI-agent infrastructure, and performance optimization in web contexts), there is no evidence of work with deep-learning workloads, GPU architecture, or hardware optimization for AI systems. The resume emphasizes web and embedded systems development, which does not align with the hardware-centric focus of the role.
strengths: Strong software engineering background with experience in AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling
Proven ability to optimize performance in web services (e.g., Direct Mail automation platform)
Extensive full-stack development experience across multiple languages and frameworks
concerns: No demonstrated experience with SoC/IP modeling, GPU architecture, or hardware-software co-design
Lacks background in AI accelerator optimization or deep-learning workload analysis
Education and work history do not align with the principal-level hardware/performance focus required
